title: Sarcoglottis pavonii
taxonomy: Sarcoglottis pavonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Sarcoglottis, which is a group of orchids native to Central and South America. The species is further classified as being part of the subtribe Spiranthinae, known for their small, delicate flowers. This classification indicates the plant's evolutionary relationships and its position within the orchid family. The specific classification of Sarcoglottis pavonii is Sarcoglottis pavonii (Lindl.)
